prologue.greeting: Welcome to OSGARD, {{name}}. 12,847 artifacts have already taken shape here. Yours hasn't — yet. In a minute you'll get access to the Forge, JARVIS, and your first credit of trust from the world. Ready to begin?

step1.title: Introduction
step1.description: OSGARD isn't a set of pages — it's a world that remembers every architect: what you've created, what you've learned, what you've achieved. The logo in the corner is your anchor, a way back at any point on the journey. Just explore: the world is already open.

step2.title: Forge Master
step2.description: The Forge is the heart of OSGARD. Here an idea, a bit of code, and a drop of TimeCoin become an artifact — something that didn't exist before. Step inside and craft your first artifact: this isn't a demo, it's the start of your collection.

step3.title: Economy
step3.description: In OSGARD, value climbs a ladder: credits → shards → crystals → TimeCoin → dollars. Each rung is a step of trust in the world. You're already earning credits right now — for completing this tour. Open the Wallet and see what your balance looks like on each rung.

step4.title: Explorer
step4.description: The JARVIS advisor answers in words — always nearby on any page. WALLI lives in the Room — its embodiment in 3D space, one you can train and upgrade. The glow on the globe is just an echo of its presence in the world. Open the WALLI Room and examine one of the artifacts.

step5.title: Voice
step5.description: Every architect leaves a trace — not just in artifacts, but in words. The OSGARD community grows from the stories, questions, and discoveries of people just like you. Leave a post or comment in the Tavern — let the world hear your voice.

step6.title: Identity
step6.description: Your profile reflects the path you've walked: level, stats, badges. Take a look and check how the world sees you now — and who you'll become a few steps from now.

step7.title: Overlord
step7.description: This step is available to platform administrators only.
step7.adminDescription: Take a look at the admin panel — this is where the fate of the OSGARD world is decided for thousands of architects after you.

step8.title: Pioneer
step8.description: One more step — and the world will hand you your first title. Ready to accept it?

final.title: Initiation
final.text: Welcome, architect. You've walked the path from newcomer to Pioneer — and the world of OSGARD has remembered every step.
final.nextGoal: Your next milestone: your first twin rental OR breaking into the Hall of Fame top 100.

jarvis.advisorTooltip: Answers in words on any page — your AI advisor

walli.roomTooltip: WALLI's embodiment in 3D space — can be trained and upgraded
walli.echoAriaLabel: Echo of WALLI's presence on the globe
walli.echoBubble: This is just an echo of WALLI. The real one is in the Room.

docsEconomyMap.title: OSGARD Economy Map
docsEconomyMap.subtitle: Five currencies and a path of trust — from the first click to real money
docsEconomyMap.step1Desc: Starting currency. Earned through activity: onboarding, posts, daily actions.
docsEconomyMap.step2Desc: Exchanged for credits inside the Forge. Used for entry-level artifacts.
docsEconomyMap.step3Desc: A rarer currency — for quality artifacts and achievements. Unlocks premium boosts.
docsEconomyMap.step4Desc: A currency with real market value. Can be staked, traded on the exchange, or withdrawn to a wallet.
docsEconomyMap.step5Desc: The final rung: TimeCoin converts to real money via the exchange or a Solana wallet withdrawal.
docsEconomyMap.ladderCaption: Each rung of the ladder is a step of trust in the OSGARD world
docsEconomyMap.footerNote: Current exchange rates — on the Wallet and Exchange pages.

support.inDevelopmentText: Live support is still being built. For answers, check the Docs or the Tavern (community).
